response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with diverse project experience, including AI-agent infrastructure and open-source contributions. However, the role requires a Principal Engineer with deep AI/ML expertise, cloud strategy leadership, and 15+ years of experience, where the candidate's background is more hands-on development and lacks explicit AI/ML product leadership or advanced degrees in the field.
strengths: Broad technical expertise across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators)
Entrepreneurial mindset with open-source contributions and startup-like projects (e.g., GISCollective)
concerns: No explicit evidence of AI/ML product leadership or recognized expertise in AI platforms
12 years of experience (below the 15-year minimum requirement)
Lacks advanced degree in AI/ML or cloud strategy (preferred qualification)
